content.en:
Forbidden Mountains.

Ye Tian walked here with a replica body, the mountains here are very large, and the distance between each peak is extremely far away, in terms of area, the space inside the forbidden mountain range is almost the same as that of the forbidden ancient well.

Moreover, there is more life here, but there is not much life inside the Forbidden Ancient Well.

For forces, a forbidden treasure land like the Forbidden Mountains is more suitable for development.

"I'm afraid that the God of War True Kingdom will not be able to be protected completely, even if the God of War is not broken, it is impossible for other forces to allow the Forbidden Mountain Range to fall into the hands of the God of War True Kingdom, they will definitely find a way to occupy here!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Since they occupied the Forbidden Mountain Range, how could those forces let go of the God of War True Kingdom?

"That's it, I can't care so much, I'm still looking for forbidden treasures!"

He was also very short of forbidden treasures now, since he stepped into the Supreme True Ancestor, his cultivation speed had increased greatly, and the refining effect of the forbidden body was far more than before, so the speed of consuming forbidden strange objects was too fast.

For example, the forbidden black lotus had already been consumed by him, and he had also used up several low-level forbidden strange things to assist in cultivation.

At this rate, it won't be long before he exhausts all the forbidden curiosities.

Therefore, he is now in urgent need of supplementing the forbidden curiosities.

Ye Tian's speed is very fast, so the speed of finding forbidden strange things is also very fast, other people find forbidden strange things, and when they encounter forbidden strange things that are not dangerous, they can also take them away immediately, but if they encounter forbidden strange things that contain great terror, it will be more troublesome.

Normally, weak beings cannot cause great terror, so many True Ancestors will grab other True Ancestors or grab some forbidden bloodline creatures to cause Great Terror, so as to take away the forbidden strange things.

But Ye Tian didn't need it, he directly used the strength of the Supreme True Ancestor to fight against the Great Terror, and easily took away the forbidden strange things, so the speed of collecting the forbidden strange things was many times faster than the others I don't know.

In the past few days, he has collected hundreds of forbidden and strange objects.

It's a pity that the level of forbidden strange things here is not as good as the forbidden strange things in the forbidden ancient well, and they are basically some low-level taboo strange things or medium taboo strange things.

For such a long time, Ye Tian hadn't even encountered a high-level forbidden strange thing.

However, he captured some forbidden bloodline creatures, and he could study them when he went back.

this day.

Ye Tian sensed a familiar breath and immediately looked at it.

......

"Hand over that forbidden artifact, or you will die!"

Behind him, a Supreme True Ancestor chased after him, Yun Zi True Ancestor's face was very pale, and he felt that the figure was getting closer and closer, and the aura of despair was permeating.

"There are so many forbidden strange things in the Forbidden Mountain Range, why do you have to hunt me down?"

Yun Zi True Ancestor asked.

"Hahaha, of course you're weak!" the Supreme True Ancestor said with a smile, "You're just a top True Ancestor, and you're alone. If I kill you, won't I be able to obtain all the forbidden strange things on your body? Besides, the forbidden strange thing you just obtained seems to be very extraordinary, maybe it is a high-level forbidden strange thing!"

This Supreme True Ancestor guessed correctly, that forbidden strange thing was a high-level forbidden strange thing, but it was of great help to Yunzi True Ancestor, and it could greatly improve her strength.

Therefore, she did not want to lose this forbidden curiosity.

Besides, even if she handed over this forbidden artifact, that Supreme True Ancestor would not let her go, and would still kill her.

"I think too highly of my strength!"

Yun Zi True Ancestor smiled bitterly.

In the God of War True Kingdom, her strength has improved almost far beyond others, and she has even had great opportunities, all the way to the top True Ancestor, which is stronger than many ancient True Ancestors in the God of War Tower.

Now, although she is a top True Ancestor, she is far from being the opponent of the Supreme True Ancestor, and the Supreme True Ancestor who chased her this time is not the weakest kind of Supreme True Ancestor.

Rumble!

A Dao attack bombarded her body, sending her directly into a mountain peak.

This blow made her injuries even more serious, and she lost any hope of escaping.

"Escape, why don't you escape? A mere top True Ancestor still dares to run away in front of my bloody True Ancestor?"

The Blood Killing True Ancestor said coldly.

I saw that the Blood Killing True Ancestor was about to kill the Yunzi True Ancestor with a trident in his hand, and suddenly a voice came.

"Blood Killing True Ancestor, you are not so brave that you dare to hurt my friend?"

As soon as the words fell, a man wearing a mask and a battle robe appeared not far from the Blood Slaying True Ancestor.

Seeing this man, the pupils of the Blood Killing True Ancestor shrank sharply, and he said in fear: "Nine Extremes General!"

The Nine Extremes General of Black Wind Mountain, the ultimate powerhouse of the invincible True Ancestor, that is a truly invincible existence at the True Ancestor level!

"General Jiuji, this person is your friend? I knew that this was the case, how dare I do it! I'll leave, leave!"

The Blood Slaughter True Ancestor turned around and was about to leave.

And yet—

"Let's go, if you can stop me, you can leave!"

Ye Tian said, and then made a move.

"Sky Splitting!"

The Extreme Level Little Thousand Dao Technique didn't seem to be very powerful, but Ye Tian's strength was too strong, causing the power of this Little Thousand Dao Technique to reach an incomparably terrifying level.

Click!

The void around the Blood Slaughter True Ancestor solidified and shattered violently.

"No!"

The Blood Slaying True Ancestor was terrified, but he could only watch as his body slowly shattered into nothingness as the void around him shattered, and even his consciousness gradually disappeared.

With just one small thousand dao technique, the Blood Killing True Ancestor was easily wiped out by Ye Tian.

Yun Zi True Ancestor, who was seriously injured not far away, was stunned when he saw this scene.

"Good...... Strong!"

Yun Zi True Ancestor said in his heart.

She can understand the strength of the Blood Killing True Ancestor, she is far from being an opponent, the other party has hit her hard with one move, if it weren't for Ye Tian's arrival, she would probably have fallen at this moment.

And such a powerful Blood Slaying True Ancestor was actually killed by Ye Tian in seconds, which shows how powerful Ye Tian is.

"Thank you, General Jiuji!" Yun Zi True Ancestor stood up and thanked him.

"It's nothing, you are familiar with the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, I saw it, it is right to save you! Your strength is too weak, get out of here quickly!"

After Ye Tian finished speaking, he left.

Yun Zi True Ancestor looked at Ye Tian's departing back and muttered, "Is the Nine Extremes General really not Ye Tian?"

The outside world said that General Jiuji and Ye Tian were two people, and she had seen Ye Tian from a distance outside the Forbidden Mountain Range before, and the other party was still guarding outside the Forbidden Mountain Range.

But I don't know what's going on, she always feels that Ye Tian and General Jiuji are the same person, but unfortunately there is no evidence, and if she says it, others won't believe it.

---------------

Saving Yun Zi True Ancestor was just a small episode, he had cooperated with Yun Zi True Ancestor a few times, and he was also a friend, and he happened to see Yun Zi True Ancestor in danger, so he would naturally go to save her.

As time passed, there were more and more True Ancestors of the Forbidden Mountain Range, while the Forbidden Treasures became fewer and fewer, and the Forbidden Blood Creatures were almost captured.

In such a situation, the fighting became frequent.

Many True Ancestors began to escape from the Forbidden Mountain Range, while other True Ancestors chased and killed, but at the beginning, Ye Tian was still able to hold the field, and he killed all the True Ancestors who fought outside the Forbidden Mountain Range, one by one, without mercy.

But gradually, more and more people were fighting, and even many invincible true ancestors also took action.

Under such circumstances, Ye Tian had no choice but to give up.

After all, he had already delayed for a long time, otherwise on the first day that the Forbidden Mountain Range was discovered, the entire God of War True Kingdom would have been beaten to pieces.

Thundered!!!!!

In the void of the God of War True Kingdom, a large number of True Ancestors were fighting.

Everyone wanted to escape with the forbidden treasure, but how could the other true ancestors who had not obtained any forbidden treasures be willing?

Under the many battles, the stars and starry sky continents were shattered by the aftermath, and countless spatial cracks spread all over the void of the God of War True Kingdom.

Any forbidden treasure has a treasure that can definitely be called rare, it may be a special top-level strange object, or it may be a forbidden treasure.

A place like the Forbidden Mountains is naturally impossible to without.

this day.

The most precious treasure of the Forbidden Mountains has been discovered.

Forbidden Mountains.

Ye Tian got the news and hurriedly rushed over.

"I didn't expect the Forbidden Dao Stone Vein to appear in the Forbidden Mountain Range!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The Forbidden Dao Stone is not an ordinary treasure, it is equivalent to some spirit stones, divine stones and other energy ores in the realm, but the level is much higher.

It is rumored that the Forbidden Dao Stone is the trading currency that exists above the Supreme Dao Ancestors, and even the Domain Ancestors use the Forbidden Dao Stone for trading.

Forbidden Dao Stones are hard to find, except for the Forbidden Realm that will be born, there is only the Initial Realm in the Dark Forbidden Realm, the Forbidden Continent.

For example, after some realms are broken, the fragments fall into the dark forbidden domain, and under the evolution of the long years, some continental fragments will slowly become forbidden continents, and there is a small probability that forbidden dao stones will be born on the forbidden continent.

But this possibility is too low, and few people dare to enter the Dark Forbidden Realm to find the Forbidden Dao Stone!

Although some Domain Ancestors would enter the Dark Forbidden Domain, they did not dare to go too deep, so if some Forbidden Dao Stones were born in the Dark Forbidden Domain area near a realm, they would be found and excavated by the Domain Ancestors and Dao Ancestors.

Because of this, the Forbidden Dao Stone is rare, very valuable, and the top currency.

But now, the Forbidden Dao Stone has appeared in the Forbidden Mountain Range, and although it is not clear what the yield is, it also means that the value of the Forbidden Mountain Range has increased many times at once.
